title: Prenatal visit schedule: key milestones
excerpt: Regular antenatal care catches gestational diabetes, anemia, and fetal growth issues early — overview of common visit timing.
content:
## Why regular visits matter

Tracking weight, blood pressure, urine protein, fetal movement, and ultrasound helps detect preeclampsia, growth restriction, and gestational diabetes.

## Reference milestones (may vary)

- **Weeks 6–12:** confirm pregnancy, dating scan.
- **Weeks 11–14:** early screening where offered.
- **Weeks 24–28:** glucose tolerance test.
- **Week 28+:** more frequent visits and kick counts.

## At each visit

Bring your pregnancy record, medication list, and written questions about diet and supplements.

## Note

Your doctor adjusts timing for medical history and risk factors.
